title: AI agents explained: Build your first agent in 8 minutes
summary: Google Agent Development Kit (ADK) is a toolkit for building autonomous multi-agent systems. The video demonstrates building a self-correcting blog writing agent using Python that combines planner and writer agents with validation and retry loops.
writeup: This video demonstrates Google's Agent Development Kit (ADK), a Python toolkit for building autonomous multi-agent systems. The walkthrough builds a self-correcting blog writing agent that combines a planner agent and a writer agent, with validation checkers and retry loops so the system reviews and revises its own output. It covers agent orchestration and the ReAct framework as the underlying patterns, showing how multiple specialized agents coordinate on a single task.
